heading: Consultative committee
label: 5607 Consultative committee

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: The Secretary of State and the Secretary, shall jointly establish a consultative committee to advise the Secretaries on issues related to the Convention.

The membership of the Committee shall include representatives from the New England and Mid-Atlantic Fishery Management Councils, the States represented on those Councils, the Atlantic States Marine Fisheries Commission, the fishing industry, the seafood processing industry, and others knowledgeable and experienced in the conservation and management of fisheries in the Northwest Atlantic Ocean.

children.heading: .—Terms and Reappointment
children.label: 2 .—Terms and Reappointment
children.text: Each member of the consultative committee shall serve for a term of 2 years and shall be eligible for reappointment.
all public meetings of the Commission;
any other meetings to which they are invited by the Commission; and
all nonexecutive meetings of the United States Commissioners.

children.heading: Relationship to other law
children.label: d Relationship to other law
children.text: Chapter 10 of title 5 shall not apply to the consultative committee established under this section.
